author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone 

May Roadmap Updates

 Hey everyone! As promised, we're committed to keeping our roadmap as up-to-date as possible to ensure you all can use it as your place of truth. Here's the latest update:

NEW: Added "In-progress" and "Completed" buttons to provide a clearer look into what roadmap items are ongoing and completed. (  = In Progress and   = Completed),NEW: Added "Facial Rigs Pt.1" to Release 2.2,MOVED: Tiers 3-5 Racers for ONI/MUD/Ustur have been moved from Release 2.2/Pre-season to Season 0.,
 | https://portal.productboard.com/cwxvzmijifly2weaj77tnfxz/tabs/2-release-2-2
